# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    url: http://users-service:8080
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000
    retries: 3
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        paths:
          - /api/users
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 1000
              policy: local
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
          - name: request-transformer
            config:
              add:
                headers:
                  - X-Forwarded-Service: users
          - name: response-transformer
            config:
              remove:
                headers:
                  - Server

  - name: orders-service
    url: http://orders-service:8080
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000
    retries: 3
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        paths:
          - /api/orders
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 500
              policy: local
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
          - name: request-transformer
            config:
              add:
                headers:
                  - X-Forwarded-Service: orders
          - name: response-transformer
            config:
              remove:
                headers:
                  - Server

  - name: payments-service
    url: http://payments-service:8080
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000
    retries: 3
    routes:
      - name: payments-route
        paths:
          - /api/payments
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        plugins:
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              minute: 200
              policy: local
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
          - name: request-transformer
            config:
              add:
                headers:
                  - X-Forwarded-Service: payments
          - name: response-transformer
            config:
              remove:
                headers:
                  - Server

  - name: auth-service
    url: http://auth-service:8080
    connect_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 30000
    write_timeout: 30000
    retries: 3
    routes:
      - name: auth-route
        paths:
          - /api/auth
        strip_path: true
        preserve_host: false
        protocols:
          - http
          - https
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
              exposed_headers:
                - X-Request-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
          - name: response-transformer
            config:
              remove:
                headers:
                  - Server

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      hide_credentials: true
  - name: jwt
    config:
      claims_to_verify:
        - exp
      header_names:
        - Authorization
      run_on_preflight: false
  - name: acl
    config:
      allow:
        - admin
        - user
  - name: ip-restriction
    config:
      allow:
        - 10.0.0.0/8
        - 192.168.0.0/16
  - name: request-size-limiting
    config:
      allowed_payload_size: 10
      size_unit: megabytes
  - name: bot-detection
    config:
      allow:
        - Googlebot
        - Bingbot
